message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "user" as user
rectangle "app" as app
rectangle "firestore" as firestore

user -> app : press "New Case"
app --> user : show case creation screen
user -> app : enter details, press save
app -> firestore : send CaseTemporary(name, summary)
firestore --> app : return Case(id, name, summary, created_at, updated_at, submitted_at, submitted)
app --> app : update local case details
app --> user : transition to story list screen/case details screen

note right of firestore
save
end note

@enduml
